name: Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious scheduled task creation events. Based on attributes such as paths, commands line flags, etc.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4698 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\roaming\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\users\public\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\desktop\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\downloads\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\temporary internet%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\perflogs\%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%regsvr32%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rundll32%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cmd.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cmd%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/c %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/k %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/r %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%powershell%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pwsh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mshta%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%wscript%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cscript%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%certutil%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%bitsadmin%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%bash.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%bash %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%scrcons%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%wmic %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%wmic.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%forfiles%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%scriptrunner%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%hh.exe%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4698 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp*%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\appdata\roaming\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\users\public\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\temp\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\desktop\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\downloads\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\temporary internet%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\perflogs\%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%regsvr32%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rundll32%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cmd.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cmd%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/c %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/k %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/r %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%powershell%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pwsh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mshta%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%wscript%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cscript%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%certutil%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%bitsadmin%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%bash.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%bash %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%scrcons%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%wmic %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%wmic.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%forfiles%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%scriptrunner%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%hh.exe%') AQL filter query

Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
